TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Vungalid ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 1,067 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,032 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Vungalid hya' ga Pucunug. tay mkyahu' na Vungalid hya' ga Payljus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč *uŇčali* …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu laj…£i …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan**%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na *uŇčali* ńßja Ē …£a pu ¶~ ®unu…£. taj mkjańßu Ē na *uŇčali* ńßja Ē …£a pajljus~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Vungalid ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Laygi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 304 buwan, 1,067 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 1,032 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 35 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan94%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Vungalid hya' ga Pucunug. tay mkyahu' na Vungalid hya' ga Payljus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč *uŇčali* …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu laj…£i …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan**%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkraja Ē na *uŇčali* ńßja Ē …£a pu ¶~ ®unu…£. taj mkjańßu Ē na *uŇčali* ńßja Ē …£a pajljus~…ē. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
